calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Dec-15-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Blair W. Will, of Pioneer Law Group, LLP, Tel. 916.287.9500, for petitioners, appearing via CourtCall;
No other appearances.

Ruling: The matter was not argued. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. PETITIONER REALTYSHARES 52, LLC's Hearing To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award is granted. No opposition filed. Order and judgment signed. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Felicia Green; Court Reporter: Mitch Lyon, CSR No. 6840; Dept. 302.
